notes: Gameplay programmer for an unannounced game with a planned release on Steam.
Led enemy spawning development in a team of 8 programmers, utilizing Unity to create a tunable spawning system for designers to easily work with.
Collaborated with other developers for integration with player movement, item spawning, and game loop systems.
